project_type: TypeScript pnpm monorepo with turbo build orchestration
build_system: pnpm workspaces + turborepo. Each package has scripts: build (tsc), typecheck (tsc --noEmit), test (vitest run), lint (eslint .)
test_framework: vitest with globals: true. Tests in src/__tests__/*.test.ts. Pattern: import {describe, it, expect} from 'vitest'
build_command: pnpm typecheck --filter=@quant/quant-tools && pnpm build --filter=@quant/quant-tools && pnpm test --filter=@quant/quant-tools
verification_instructions: 1. Run pnpm typecheck --filter=@quant/quant-tools 2. Run pnpm build --filter=@quant/quant-tools 3. Run pnpm test --filter=@quant/quant-tools 4. Run pnpm lint --filter=@quant/quant-tools
environment_constraints: Node >=22.0.0, pnpm 10.28.1, TypeScript ~5.5.0. No @ts-ignore allowed. noUnusedLocals and noUnusedParameters are enabled in root tsconfig.
contribution_requirements: Package must be private, type: module. Use .js extensions in imports. Exports through src/index.ts. tsconfig extends ../../tsconfig.json with composite: true, outDir: ./dist, rootDir: ./src
key_patterns: 1. Zod for schema validation (z.object, z.enum, z.nativeEnum). 2. Classes with Maps for registries. 3. Tests use factory helpers (createMock*). 4. Index.ts re-exports all public API with explicit named exports. 5. Types in separate types.ts file. 6. No default exports.
directory_structure: packages/ contains shared libraries. apps/ contains frontend apps. services/ contains backend services. Each package: package.json, tsconfig.json, src/ with index.ts entry point and __tests__/ for tests.
